## Checklist

- [ ] One problem per PR
- [ ] Tests added/updated and `bun test` passes (schema and/or app)
- [ ] Docs pairs updated together (README.md ↔ README.es.md, docs/x.md ↔ docs/x.es.md) when docs change
- [ ] `claude plugin validate ./plugin` passes if plugin changed
- [ ] Conventional-commit style title
